title: Zoro Exposes Whiskey Peak
description: On pages 2–5, zoro exposes whiskey peak as while the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters.
scene: Zoro Exposes Whiskey Peak. While the crew sleeps after the feast, Zoro stays awake and discovers the town’s real identity as a nest of bounty hunters. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And the welcoming party at whiskey peak continues...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And so I coolly said to him,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: "Don't you dare lay a hand on my crewmates, you sea King bastards!"

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, to be perfectly honest, even I trembbled a little during our great escape from calm belt...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And this lady here Outdrank 12 people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What a couple of heavy drinkers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Holy moly! Here we have their captain who's eaten enough food for 20 people!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And would you take a look at this lady- Killer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's flirting with 20 women all by himself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your enjoyment means the world to us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Although we were unsuccessful- full in our task to secure food for the town...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: To make up for our blunder, we have succeeded in... During those pirates to cactus Island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If we send this to the boss, I'm sure we'll be cleared of our shame.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So let's hurry up and put our report in the Unlockies' box.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They'll be sure to deliver our report,

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on zoro exposes whiskey peak. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
